subcategory: Grid background with radial gradient orb
use_cases: Page-level background for landing pages and marketing sites
Hero section backdrop with subtle visual depth
Content container backgrounds for dashboard layouts
Modal or card section dividers with visual interest
ai_summary: A decorative background component featuring a 40x40px grid pattern overlaid with a radial gradient orb (magenta to purple) that creates subtle visual depth. The component uses CSS background properties for efficient rendering and serves as a reusable backdrop for any content container or page section.
